info.title: Service Tracking Platform API
info.description:
REST API for the Service Tracking Platform with AI powered service request classification and technician assignment.
        
        Features:
        - JWT-based authentication and authorization
        - AI Smart Request Creation
        - AI Technician Recommendation
        - Status Transition Management
        - Real-time Assignment Workflow

post.description: Endpoint to create a new service

get.description: Endpoint to get details of a specific service by its ID

200.description: Details of a service retrieved successfully

get.description: Endpoint to get all service requests

200.description: List of service requests retrieved successfully

post.description: Endpoint to create a new service request

get.description: Endpoint to get details of a specific service request by its ID

200.description: Details of a service request retrieved successfully

put.description: Endpoint to update a service request

delete.description: Endpoint to delete a service request

post.description: Endpoint to create a new service request

get.description: Endpoint to get all job assignments

200.description: List of job assignments retrieved successfully

post.description: Endpoint to create a new job assignment

get.summary: Recommend a technician for a service request
get.description: Endpoint to recommend the best available technician for a given service request ID

parameters.name: serviceRequestId
parameters.description: ID of the service request to get a technician recommendation for

get.description: Endpoint to get details of a specific job assignment by its ID

put.description: Endpoint to update a job assignment

delete.description: Endpoint to delete a job assignment

get.description: Endpoint to get all assigned requests

200.description: List of assigned requests retrieved successfully

patch.summary: Updates a status of the assignment

get.description: Endpoint to get details of a specific location by its ID

JWT.description:
JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. 
                Enter ONLY your JWT token in the input below (without 'Bearer ' prefix).
                
                Example: "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..."
